summary: The diff implements the affine cipher logic and UI components in a React/TypeScript framework (frontend/src/App.tsx, index.css, main.tsx, tailwind.config.js) rather than a single self-contained HTML file with inline CSS and JS. This fundamentally violates REQ-1, which requires a single static HTML file with all CSS in a <style> tag and all JS in a <script> tag, no external JS libraries, no build tools, and compatibility with file:// protocol. The implementation uses React, TypeScript, Tailwind, lucide-react, @tanstack/react-query, @dfinity/auth-client, and other external dependencies — all prohibited by the constraints. The logic for REQ-2, REQ-3, and REQ-4 appears to be implemented in App.tsx but is delivered through a framework build pipeline rather than the required vanilla JS single file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create a single frontend file containing a fully self-contained single-page app with all CSS in a <style> tag and all logic in a <script> tag — no external JS libraries, no build tools, works via file:// protocol.
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation uses a React/TypeScript/Tailwind/Vite build pipeline with multiple source files and external JS libraries. No single self-contained index.html with inline CSS/JS was produced. The frontend/index.html references /src/main.tsx via a module script, requiring a server/bundler.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication integration (useInternetIdentity hook, AuthClient, DelegationIdentity, login/clear/status flows)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states user accounts and backend canister logic are non-goals. Internet Identity authentication was never requested.

hallucinated_features.description: ICP actor/canister integration (useActor hook, createActorWithConfig, backendInterface, @dfinity dependencies)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states backend canister or Motoko logic is a non-goal. The app is fully static frontend-only with no ICP actor interaction required.

hallucinated_features.description: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Vite build framework used instead of vanilla JS
hallucinated_features.reason: The constraints explicitly require no external JavaScript libraries, no build tools or frameworks, and the file must work via file:// protocol. Using React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and a build pipeline directly violates these constraints.

hallucinated_features.description: lucide-react icon library used (Copy, Check, Lock, Unlock, ChevronDown, Shield, Hash, Calculator, BookOpen icons)
hallucinated_features.reason: The constraints explicitly prohibit external JavaScript libraries. lucide-react is an external JS dependency not permitted by the build request.
This is an external JS library not permitted by the constraints, and actor/query management was not requested for this purely static frontend app.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode CSS variables and theming
hallucinated_features.reason: Dark mode support was not requested in the build request or acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: JetBrains Mono font loaded alongside Inter
hallucinated_features.reason: Only Inter was specified in REQ-4. JetBrains Mono was not requested.
